title: Integrations
description: One connected external service (a wearable, patient portal, or notification channel) the app syncs data with. Access tokens live here so the sync hooks can refresh them; nothing here is ever shown raw to the user.

status.description: 'disconnected' | 'connected' | 'error' — whether we currently hold usable credentials

accessToken.description: OAuth access token for the provider REST API (null until connected)

refreshToken.description: OAuth refresh token used to renew the access token

expiresAt.description: when the current access token expires

lastSyncAt.description: timestamp of the last successful sync from this provider

lastError.description: the most recent sync/connect error, if any (for the settings status UI)

createdAt.description: when the integration row was created
